3170480.name: Phasmonauts Demo
3170480.description:
Step into the supernatural with this special demo of Phasmonauts, a cryptid-hunting roguelite full of unpredictable danger. This demo features one full level that showcases the heart of the full game.

Unlike the full release’s 4-player local co-op, the demo lets you go solo while choosing from four unique characters, each with their own playstyle.

Replayable Experience: The level is procedurally generated using handmade encounters, making you never feel safe as the world and its danger change every playthrough.

Unique Folklore: Discover which cryptid is haunting the campsite, using unique upgrades and fighting off unfamiliar monsters. Having trouble? Befriend each map's unique Fae-folk to help you along the way.

Equipment: Use well-known paranormal equipment such as EMF Readers and Spirit Journals to find clues and solve which Cryptid is haunting an area. Find Cursed Possessions and Fae-Folk that grant information or abilities in exchange for your sanity.

Customize Tools: Craft your own supernatural equipment and weapons by completing quests for Gnomes and other woodland creatures. Each challenge leaves you with legendary rewards, but do you trust the Fae-folk?
3170480.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
